drift_flags.note: Registry Section 3 names 'table.comfortable' for D1=-1 Collections; the catalogue's collections/table entry exposes variants {default, compact, selectable, expandable-row, editable, virtualised, sticky-header} which do not include 'comfortable'. The variant-generator fell back to 'default' and preserved careful-pace composition (per-row confirm; bulk-select disabled) via composition adjustments. Registry/catalogue mismatch — upstream alignment needed.
